mesh.title: Mesh
mesh.subtitle: Fleet node topology, reachability, and health across your tailnet
mesh.emptyText: The hive has no nodes yet. Once nodes join the mesh, their topology and health will appear here in real time.

fleetChat.title: Fleet Chat
fleetChat.subtitle: Broadcast channel between you and every agent in the fleet
fleetChat.emptyText: When agents report in or you broadcast an order, the conversation will appear here.

kanban.title: Kanban
kanban.subtitle: Task board for work assigned to the swarm
kanban.emptyText: Queue work for your agents and track it from backlog to done.

briefs.title: Briefs
briefs.subtitle: Digest reports compiled by the fleet — daily standups, incident recaps, summaries
briefs.emptyText: The fleet has not filed any briefs yet. Generated digests of fleet activity will land here.

cortex.title: Cortex
cortex.subtitle: Shared knowledge base the whole fleet can read and write
cortex.emptyText: No knowledge has been ingested yet. Feed the Cortex documents, notes, and lessons so every agent shares the same brain.

evolution.title: Evolution
evolution.subtitle: Self-improvement cycles — lessons learned, mutations applied, fitness over time
evolution.emptyText: The swarm has not mutated yet. Start a self-improvement cycle to evolve agent skills and track fitness across generations.

federation.title: Federation
federation.subtitle: Fleet-of-fleets: read-only monitoring of other Open Fleet Control dashboards
federation.readOnlyNote: v1 is read-only monitoring — this dashboard never issues write operations against federated remotes.
federation.emptyText: Add another Open Fleet Control dashboard's URL below to watch its fleet — mesh health, kanban flow, evolution gate, and alerts — from a single pane of glass.
federation.tokenHint: HTTPS only. The token is stored server-side and never displayed again.

logs.title: Audit Logs
logs.subtitle: Immutable trail of every action taken by the fleet and its operators
logs.emptyText: Every command, mutation, and agent action will be recorded here as soon as the fleet starts acting.
